story: Jimmy met Gemma and agreed to see each other at Saturday’s dance. All week he prepared; his parents helped; he got a suit. Earlier that afternoon, Rory told Duncan he meant to try his luck with Gemma at the dance, maybe even snog her. That evening, after the car nearly failed and a mechanic fixed it, Jimmy arrived just a little late. He straightened his tie, thanked his dad, took a deep breath, and stood at the hall door with the music spilling out.
implausible_knowledge: Rory told Duncan he meant to try his luck with Gemma at the dance, maybe even snog her
question: As Jimmy stands at the dance-hall door, what will he do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Peek through the window first to see whether Gemma is with someone before going in.
answer_without_knowledge: Walk straight into the hall to look for Gemma.
